overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a covered pedestrian bridge in a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), transitioning from a shaded enclosed walkway to a bright open street with towering glass skyscrapers and steady vehicle traffic passing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside busy highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian bridge, moving toward the bright exit ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the adjacent highway

entered.detail: geometric metal and glass roof structure creating a tunnel-like enclosure
translucent glass panels on the left side of the walkway showing reflections
angular steel beams supporting the overhead structure
metal railing separating the pedestrian walkway from the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through the interior of a covered pedestrian bridge. The space is enclosed with a geometric glass and metal roof overhead, translucent glass walls on the left, and a busy multi-lane highway visible through barriers on the right. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the road while the camera moves steadily toward a bright exit in the distance.

events.description: ambient light increases significantly as the camera approaches the bright exit of the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the walkway as the enclosed space opens up ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car with glowing accents driving past on the highway

entered.detail: tall futuristic buildings becoming visible through the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the end of the covered walkway where bright daylight becomes visible. The geometric roof structure recedes into the distance while futuristic skyscrapers come into view at the far end. The lighting transitions from artificial shade to natural sunlight, and vehicles continue to pass on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open futuristic city street with high-rise commercial towers

events.description: exits the covered pedestrian bridge into the open urban environment with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk with towering skyscrapers now visible on the right side

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi-style vehicle driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall glass and steel buildings with yellow structural accents and reflective surfaces
large digital holographic advertisement display visible at the end of the street
tropical trees planted along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a bright open street in a futuristic metropolis. Modern glass skyscrapers with industrial yellow framing rise on the right, while a large holographic billboard is visible in the distance. The environment is fully exposed to clear skies and sunlight, with palm trees visible near the building bases and continuous vehicle traffic on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the shaded interior of a covered pedestrian bridge into the bright, open expanse of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within an enclosed walkway characterized by a geometric glass and metal roof, moving steadily past translucent walls while futuristic vehicles stream along a highway to the right. As the camera approaches the end of the bridge, the artificial shade gives way to intensifying natural sunlight, and the roof structure recedes to reveal towering skyscrapers in the distance. The scene then opens fully into a sunlit street where modern glass buildings with industrial yellow framing rise sharply against a clear sky. Finally, the perspective expands to show a large holographic billboard and palm trees lining the base of the architecture as vehicle traffic continues to flow alongside the path.
